description: Independently scanned live configuration-key consumption (process.env + compose ${} substitutions). Generated; the source of truth for R18 consumption reconciliation. directAccessOutsideComposition counts PRODUCT-runtime direct reads only (the V1C-CONF-06 target); approvedExceptionAccess counts reads inside an approved NON-product boundary (operator-script: apps/platform-api/scripts/** + scripts/**; dev-ci-tooling: tools/**; web-build: vite.config.* — each a composition root / CI tool with its own contextual defaults, codified as the enforcement exception list).
